rows.yaml:
collection: FortiSOAR
playbooks:
  - name: IP Block or Allow Decision
    description: Prompt analyst to enter an IP and choose to block or allow it
    steps:
      - type: manual_input
        name: Analyst Input
        arguments:
          title: IP Block or Allow Decision
          description: Enter an IP address and choose whether to block or allow it
          inputs:
            - name: ip_address
              kind: ipv4
              label: IP Address
              required: true
            - name: action
              kind: select
              label: Action
              options:
                - block
                - allow
              required: true
        options:
          - display: Submit
            primary: true
            next: Check Action
      - type: decision
        name: Check Action
        conditions:
          - display: Block
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Input.input.action == 'block' }}"
            next: Block IP on FortiGate
          - display: Allow
            default: true
            next: Log Allow Decision
      - type: connector
        name: Block IP on FortiGate
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip_new
          config: ''
          params:
            method: Quarantine Based
            ip_addresses: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Input.input.ip_address }}"
            time_to_live: 1 Hour
            vdom: ''
        next: Log Block Decision
      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Block Decision
        vars:
          action_result: "IP {{ vars.steps.Analyst_Input.input.ip_address }} blocked on FortiGate"
        message:
          content: "Blocking action completed for IP {{ vars.steps.Analyst_Input.input.ip_address }}"
          tags:
            - ip_block
      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Allow Decision
        vars:
          action_result: "IP {{ vars.steps.Analyst_Input.input.ip_address }} allow decision noted, no block applied"
        message:
          content: "Allow decision noted for IP {{ vars.steps.Analyst_Input.input.ip_address }}, no firewall action taken"
          tags:
            - ip_allow
      - type: end
        name: End

errors.message: playbook 'IP Block or Allow Decision' has no 'start' step
errors.suggestion: add `- id: start\n  type: start` as the first step
suggestions: add `- id: start\n  type: start` as the first step
